parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Cost per incremental enrollee per year

parameters.name: kappa
parameters.description: Health-channel parameter mapping enrollment changes to mortality fraction changes

programs.comments: Uses the accounting identity deltaN = deltaB / c to express beta as proportional mortality effect from either spending or enrollment, scaled by kappa.

parameters.name: c
parameters.description: Average dollars spent per incremental enrollee per year

parameters.name: kappa
parameters.description: Unitless parameter capturing mortality effect per incremental enrollee

programs.comments: Explicitly uses deltaN = deltaB / c to convert spending to enrollment before applying mortality effect parameter kappa.
